title: Distance Learning Cannot Replace the Classroom
subtitle: 远程教育无法取代课堂

paragraphs.en: In the coming era of budget cuts to education, distance learning could become the norm. The temptation for those in charge of education budgets to trade teachers for technology could be so strong that they ignore the disadvantages of distance learning. School facilities are expensive to build and maintain, and teachers are expensive to employ. Online classes do not require buildings and each class can host hundreds of people simultaneously, resulting in greater savings, thus increasing the temptation of distance education for those concerned more about budgets than learning.
paragraphs.zh: 在即将到来的教育预算削减时代，远程学习可能成为常态。对教育预算负责人而言，用技术替代教师的诱惑可能大到让他们忽视远程学习的缺点。学校设施造价高昂，教师薪酬也不便宜。在线课程不需要教室，每堂课可同时容纳数百人，节省更多，对那些更关心预算而非学习的人来说诱惑更大。

paragraphs.en: But moving away from a traditional classroom in which a living, breathing human being teaches and interacts with students daily would be a disaster. Physically attending school has hidden benefits: getting up every morning, interacting with peers, and building relationships with teachers are essential skills to cultivate in young people. Moreover, schools should be more than simple institutions of traditional learning. They are now places that provide meals. They are places where students receive counseling and other support.
paragraphs.zh: 但放弃传统课堂——那个有活生生的人每天教学并与学生互动的地方——将是一场灾难。亲自到校上学有许多隐性好处：每天早起、与同伴互动、与老师建立关系，这些都是年轻人需要培养的基本技能。而且，学校应不仅仅是传统的学习场所，它们还提供饮食，为学生提供心理咨询和其他支持。

paragraphs.en: Those policy-makers are often fascinated by the latest technology in education and its potential to "transform" education overnight. But online education does not allow a teacher to keep a struggling student after class and offer help. Educational videos may deliver academic content, but they are unable to make eye contact or assess a student's level of engagement. Distance education will never match the personal teaching in a traditional classroom.
paragraphs.zh: 那些政策制定者常常被最新的教育技术和它一夜之间「变革」教育的潜力所吸引。但在线教育无法让老师课后留下有困难的学生提供帮助。教育视频可以传递学术内容，但无法进行眼神交流或评估学生的参与度。远程教育永远无法与传统课堂的亲身教学相比。

paragraphs.en: In their first 18 years of life, American children spend only 9% of their time in school. Yet teachers are expected to prepare them to be responsible citizens, cultivate their social skills, encourage successful time management, and enhance their capacity to flourish in an increasingly harsh labor market. Given these expectations, schools should not become permanently "remote".
paragraphs.zh: 在人生的前18年，美国孩子只有9%的时间在学校度过。然而教师被期望培养学生成为负责任的公民，培养社交技能，学会时间管理，提升他们在日益严峻的劳动力市场中立足的能力。鉴于这些期望，学校不应永久变为「远程」模式。

paragraphs.en: The power of the classroom is rooted in the humanity of the people gathered in the same place, at the same time. Personal teaching is about teachers showing students a higher path, and about young people going through the process together. Technology, no matter how advanced, should simply be a tool of a good teacher.
paragraphs.zh: 课堂的力量植根于同一时间聚集在同一地点的人的人性。亲身教学是老师为学生指引更高的方向，是年轻人一起走过成长历程。技术无论多先进，都应该只是好老师的工具。
